etymology.description: Depicts a chimney with soot building up upwards -> darkening to black
etymology.interpretation: Originally depicted a chimney with soot accumulating, creating a visual representation of something becoming dark or black due to soot deposits.
etymology.simplification: 黒 is simplified by replacing two small dots with a single horizontal stroke, reflecting a cursive shorthand approach.

examples.chinese: 她穿了一件黒色的夹克(她穿了一件黑色的夾克)。
examples.pinyin: Tā chuānle yī jiàn hēisè de jiākè.

examples.chinese: 夜空中满是黒色的云(夜空中滿是黑色的雲)。
examples.pinyin: Yèkōng zhōng mǎn shì hēisè de yún.
examples.english: The night sky is full of black clouds.

examples.chinese: 他的头发是深黒色(他的頭髮是深黑色)。
examples.pinyin: Tā de tóufà shì shēn hēisè.
examples.english: His hair is a deep black.
